edition.dagbeeld: De Amerikaanse aanvallen op Iran gaan de tweede dag in nadat Trump het staakt-het-vuren dood verklaarde — terwijl de Straat van Hormuz gesloten blijft en oliemarkten schokken. In de VS brengen de democraten zichzelf in problemen: met het gedwongen vertrek van senaatskandidaat Graham Platner dreigt een cruciale zetel verloren te gaan vóór de tussentijdse verkiezingen.

article.summary: Last year, MIT’s Media Lab came out with a buzzy study on a phenomenon that’s been coined “cognitive debt.” In short, the researchers found that when ChatGPT users offloaded essay writing tasks to their AI assistants, their own writing abilities declined. article.title: Western Europe experiences hottest June on record
article.summary: Searing heatwaves brought an average temperature of 20.74°C in June, more than 3°C above the norm. Experts are predicting more intense and longer-lasting heatwaves for the region.

items.title: How Ukrainians are turning Crimea, the Russians' Riviera, into a battlefield
items.summary: The annexed Ukrainian peninsula, which Vladimir Putin sees as his crowning jewel, has descended into chaos as Kyiv ramps up attacks on the territory. Shocked tourists and residents express their distress as shortages worsen.
